ksa_text: Knowledge of data integration and ETL patterns, including ETL, ELT, change data capture (CDC), event streaming, API-based integration, and data virtualization approaches.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-004 (DA, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4095 is insufficient to establish relevance to survey design, statistical analysis, and research data management at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.410, dcwf=0.405, eu_ai_act=0.401) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4095 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-K-004 (composite 0.4095) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4095 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Survey Researcher at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.4095 is not a standard requirement for Survey Researcher at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4095, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
